channel.title: SaaS Tools — Calculators & Guides for Bootstrapped Founders
channel.description: Free financial calculators and practical guides for bootstrapped SaaS founders. No fluff, no VC narratives.

item.title: SaaS Runway Calculator: How Many Months of Cash Do You Have Left?
item.description: Calculate your SaaS runway months instantly. See if your burn rate puts you in danger. For bootstrapped founders who need financial clarity without fluff.

item.title: SaaS Metrics Calculator: MRR Growth, Churn, NRR & More in Seconds
item.description: Calculate MRR growth, net revenue retention, churn rates, ARR, and Rule of 40 instantly. The dashboard bootstrapped SaaS founders rely on every month.

item.title: SaaS Growth Calculator: MRR Growth Rate, NRR & Rule of 40
item.description: Calculate your SaaS MRR growth rate, net new MRR, ARR, NRR, and Rule of 40 instantly. The growth metrics calculator for bootstrapped SaaS founders.

item.title: SaaS Churn Calculator: Logo, MRR, and Revenue at Risk
item.description: Calculate your SaaS churn rate instantly. See customer churn, MRR churn, net churn, and annual revenue at risk. Essential metrics for bootstrapped founders

item.title: Would These Churn Tactics Actually Reduce SaaS Churn Rate, or Just Burn Your Runway?
item.description: Would churn tactics reduce SaaS churn rate or just burn time? 4 retention strategies tested with real bootstrapped MRR outcomes. See results.

item.title: Will Your SaaS Customer Retention Rate Survive Scaling? A Bootstrapped Founder's Stress Test
item.description: Will your SaaS customer retention rate survive scaling? Stress-test retention, spot destabilizers early, and stabilize MRR before churn drains your runway.

item.title: Will Your SaaS Customer Retention Rate Increase? A Bootstrapped Founder's Blueprint for Upward Retention Motion
item.description: Will your SaaS customer retention rate increase? Learn 4 tactics that boost monthly retention and extend your bootstrapped runway, backed by churn metrics.

item.title: Will SaaS Customer Retention Rate Be Reduced? The Diagnostic Check Bootstrapped Founders Can't Afford to Skip
item.description: Is your SaaS retention rate destined to drop? Discover the diagnostic framework to catch hidden compressors before they silently erode your MRR.

item.title: Will Your SaaS Churn Rate Increase? The Compound Effect That Quietly Destroys Your Runway
item.description: Will your SaaS churn rate increase over time? The hidden compound effect silently erodes MRR month after month—stop it before it destroys your runway.

item.title: Why Is SaaS Churn Rate So High? The Brutal Structural Truth Bootstrapped Founders Can’t Afford to Ignore
item.description: Why SaaS churn rates are so stubbornly high: low switching costs, subscription fatigue, and the structural trap. Bootstrapped insights and real fixes.

item.title: Why SaaS Churn Rate Is Low: The Retention Levers That Quietly Save Your Runway
item.description: Discover the real reasons SaaS churn stays low—product stickiness, pricing psychology, and operational habits that quietly extend your bootstrapped runway.

item.title: Why SaaS Churn Rate Increase? The Root Causes Bootstrapped Founders Ignore Until It’s Too Late
item.description: Why your SaaS churn rate increases: root causes from pricing misalignment to onboarding decay. Diagnose and stop MRR bleed before it compounds.

item.title: Which SaaS Customer Retention Policy Actually Stops MRR Bleed for Bootstrapped Founders?
item.description: Wondering which SaaS customer retention policy stops MRR bleed? Use this decision framework and case study to pick the right policy for your bootstrapped SaaS.

item.title: Where to Reduce SaaS Churn Rate: The Tactical Friction Map for Bootstrapped Founders
item.description: Pinpoint where to reduce SaaS churn rate with a friction map. Calculate churn by stage, benchmark by tier, and apply 4 fixes that stop MRR bleed fast.

item.title: Should You Reduce Your SaaS Churn Rate? A Brutal Cost-Benefit Analysis for Bootstrapped Founders
item.description: Should you reduce SaaS churn rate or focus on growth? Use our cost-benefit framework to see the true runway math before you invest another dollar.

item.title: SaaS User Retention: The Engagement Metric That Predicts Churn Before It Hits Your MRR
item.description: Master SaaS user retention: calculate your retention rate, benchmark by tier, and deploy 4 tactics to stop silent churn before it drains MRR.

item.title: SaaS Rates: The Brutal Math Behind Pricing, Growth, and Survival
item.description: Stop bleeding MRR. We break down the brutal math of SaaS rates, from churn benchmarks to unit economics, specifically for bootstrapped founders.

item.title: The 48-Hour Churn Trap: Fixing SaaS Customer Retention 2 Days After Signup
item.description: Stop losing new users. Learn how to fix SaaS customer retention 2 days after signup by optimizing your 48-hour onboarding window and reducing early churn.

item.title: SaaS Churn Rate: The Silent Runway Killer Every Bootstrapped Founder Must Stop Before It Compounds
item.description: SaaS churn rate kills bootstrapped MRR. Learn to calculate, benchmark by tier, see the compounding cost, and apply 4 founder-tested tactics to fix it.

item.title: Is SaaS Churn Rate the Same? Why Logo, Gross MRR, and Net Revenue Churn Paint Wildly Different Pictures
item.description: Is SaaS churn rate the same? No — logo, gross MRR, and net revenue churn each reveal different truths. Confusing them silently bleeds bootstrapped MRR.
